topTargets.name: Jeremiyah Love
topTargets.reasoning: Lock at 1.01 — Consensus #1 Tier 1 (RB1, ARI), RSP DoT 89.3 Starter grade with All-Pro/Kamara comp, MFL ADP 3.59. All three boards converge and our RB room (only 5 deep) needs the alpha.

topTargets.name: Emmett Johnson
topTargets.reasoning: Top target at 1.14 — Consensus #13 Tier 2 (RB5, KC) and RSP DoT 84.6 #8 (Rotational Starter, Harold Fannin trajectory comp). Medium RSP weight rewards a Consensus+RSP double-up at our shallowest skill spot, and KC landing spot is league-defining.

topTargets.name: Mike Washington Jr.
topTargets.reasoning: Backup plan at 1.14 if E. Johnson is gone — Consensus #11 Tier 2 (RB4, LV), RSP #28 DoT 82.5, ADP 24.09. Consensus loves the LV opportunity even if RSP is cooler; with 50% Consensus weight he is in range.

topTargets.name: Elijah Sarratt
topTargets.reasoning: 2.01 target — Consensus #20 Tier 3 (WR11, BAL), RSP #17 DoT 83.9 'safest WR option among 10-16'. WR depth isn't a need but BAL target share + cross-board agreement is too clean to pass at the round-2 turn.

topTargets.name: Demond Claiborne
topTargets.reasoning: 2.16 target — Consensus #26 Tier 4 (RB8, MIN) but RSP #9 DoT 84.5 with Shady McCoy comp. Exactly the late-2nd convergence the medium-affinity GM exploits: 25% RSP weight pushes him above straight Consensus and triples down on RB scarcity behind Love.

capPosture: Healthy — $11.4M space on $45M cap; can absorb rookie active-roster contracts without taxi gymnastics, but late picks (2.16, 3.01) still likely go taxi for development.

wildcard.name: Skyler Bell
wildcard.reasoning: 3.01 RSP-driven swing — RSP #6 DoT 85.9 Starter grade with Ja'Marr Chase high-end comp, but Consensus #33 (Free Agents tier, BUF). Medium affinity (25% RSP) gives just enough cover to reach for the lottery ticket on a taxi stash when Tier 5 Consensus names (Virgil, Randall, Stribling) are uninspiring.

summary: FIRE owns the 1.01 plus the round 1/2/3 turns and uses that leverage to fix a thin RB room behind a Love-led core. Expect a Love-anchored draft that doubles up on RB (E. Johnson or M. Washington at 1.14, Claiborne at 2.16) with a BAL WR (Sarratt) at 2.01 for value. The 3.01 is where medium RSP affinity bites — willing to deviate from Consensus Tier 5 for a Waldman favorite like Skyler Bell on a taxi flier.
